product_overview: Tawla is a Next.js-based restaurant management SaaS that enables zero-friction guest ordering, admin menu management, and role-based staff redirects (cashier). This PRD describes three critical end-to-end workflows to validate core product flows locally.
core_goals: Enable guests to place orders without authentication and receive a QR confirmation
Provide admins with a secure interface to create and manage menu items
Ensure staff receive role-based redirects (e.g., cashier to /[slug]/cashier) after login

features.name: Guest Ordering Flow
features.description: Allow an unauthenticated guest to browse a restaurant menu by table, add items to a cart, checkout, and receive an order confirmation QR without requiring login.
user_flows: Navigate to /susushi/menu?table=1 -> See menu items on page -> Click add to cart on a menu item -> Navigate to /susushi/cart -> See cart with selected items -> Click Checkout button -> Click place order / Confirm and Generate QR -> Land on /susushi/qr and see QR confirmation page

Navigate to /susushi/menu?table=1 -> See menu items on page -> Click add to cart on a menu item -> Navigate to /susushi/checkout -> Click place order / Confirm and Generate QR -> Supabase createOrderWithItemsClient fails -> See error message 'Unable to create order, please try again'

features.name: Admin Login and Create Menu Item
features.description: Allow an authenticated admin to sign in, access the admin dashboard, and create a new menu item which appears in the menu list.
user_flows: Navigate to /login -> Fill email input with 'admin@susushi.com' -> Fill password input with 'password123' -> Click Sign in -> Redirect to /admin -> Navigate to /admin/menu -> Click Add Item -> Fill item name field -> Fill item price field -> Select item category -> Click Create item -> See new item in menu list
Navigate to /login -> Fill email input with 'admin@susushi.com' -> Fill password input with 'wrongpassword' -> Click Sign in -> See authentication error message 'Invalid credentials'
Navigate to /admin/menu -> Click Add Item -> Leave Name empty -> Fill item price field -> Select item category -> Click Create item -> See validation error 'Name is required'

features.name: Staff RBAC Cashier Redirect
features.description: Authenticate staff users and redirect cashiers to their restaurant cashier page (hall overview) based on their role.
user_flows: Navigate to /login -> Fill email input with 'cashier@susushi.com' -> Fill password input with 'password123' -> Click Sign in -> System redirects to /susushi/cashier -> See cashier/hall overview heading
Navigate to /login -> Fill email input with 'cashier@susushi.com' -> Fill password input with 'wrongpassword' -> Click Sign in -> See authentication error 'Invalid credentials'

routes.description: User login with email and password
Menu browse and add to cart

features.name: Guest Ordering Flow
features.description: Navigate to menu with table, add item to cart, go to checkout, place order
user_interactions: Click add to cart on a menu item
Click place order / Confirm and Generate QR

features.name: Admin Login and Create Menu Item
features.description: Login as admin, go to admin menu, create a new menu item
user_interactions: Fill item name and price and category

features.name: Staff RBAC Cashier Redirect
features.description: Login as cashier and verify redirect to restaurant cashier page
